construction: leaf = record.hash (lowercase hex), records sorted by id; parent = SHA256(utf8(leftHex+rightHex)); odd row duplicates its last node.
note: Derived from the Bitcoin-anchored seal-manifest.json — NOT separately stamped. The merkleRoot is a deterministic function of the record hashes already committed by manifestHash, so it is transitively Bitcoin-anchored. Verify: recompute merkleRoot from the manifest's record hashes, then check any proof against it.
